model: deepseek-v4-pro sharded review with deepseek-v4-flash synthesis
non_blocking_findings: Delta review noted the command field appears before summary in one ledger test-evidence entry; this is cosmetic and does not affect gate parsing or closeout validity.

scope.diff_summary: The Workbench next-action readout policy was extracted from src/workflow/workbench-projection.js into a 497-line src/workflow/workbench-next-action-readout.js module. The projection composer decreased from 1944 to 1463 lines, preserves imported output helpers, and passes AGENT_LIFECYCLE_EVENT_TYPES into the new helper instead of duplicating the lifecycle event set.

notes: DeepSeek's source shard confirmed the next_action_readout and next_action_terminal output shapes were preserved, frontend acceptance and governance audit constants are imported without stale duplication, and lifecycle-driver handling uses the passed-in AGENT_LIFECYCLE_EVENT_TYPES set. Test shards confirmed scheduler, reviewer, lifecycle, plan-review, context-pack, global-goal, shell, and terminal next-action assertions remained intact. Metadata shards confirmed the large-file manifest and plan did not claim fixed before review. A delta ledger review confirmed the line-count evidence and exit_code test evidence were strengthened, then final synthesis returned PASS.
